scripts.dev: infisical run -- uv run --project . python -m scraper.main markdown https://example.com
scripts.start: infisical run -- uv run --project . python -m scraper.main
scripts.test: infisical run -- uv run --project . --group dev python -m pytest tests
scripts.typecheck: infisical run -- uv run --project . python -m compileall src
scripts.markdown: infisical run -- uv run --project . python -m scraper.main markdown
scripts.css: infisical run -- uv run --project . python -m scraper.main css
scripts.llm: infisical run -- uv run --project . python -m scraper.main llm
